label: 221 to 237 Repealed. , title XIII, § 1313,July 1, 1944, ch. 37358 Stat. 714
notes: Section 221, , , defined “habit-forming narcotic drug”, “narcotic”, and “addict”. See , The Public Health and Welfare.act Jan. 19, 1929, ch. 82, § 145 Stat. 1085section 201 of Title 42
